data.body: Plan-review (review-plan) completed: PASS, 0 blocking / 10 advisory, attestation signed. Remediated the VALID advisories: (G4) added _io/ — 7 BLE001 noqas in import_ndjson.py — to the core-leaves sweep crow-aeon-muck + file-impact, closing the allowlist-reachability gap; (G4) substrate slip-clink-conch now wires a stderr handler at the reconciler subprocess __main__.main + NullHandler on the sibling 'rebar_reconciler' root logger (it is NOT under 'rebar'); (G4) corrected T201 scoping in exemplar + close-out (all 42 T201 noqas live in _engine/rebar_reconciler/, not the CLI); (T5e) added a 'document the convention in CLAUDE.md' deliverable to the epic + close-out; (F1) softened AC4 so it is not vacuously satisfied. RULED OUT as invalid: the 'ERROR: grep contract' G4 finding — no test greps reconciler stderr for ERROR: (verified). NOTE: review wall-clock was ~hours vs docs' 'seconds to minutes' — separate perf discrepancy, not a code bug.
